title: Create synonyms knowledge file
description: Create data/synonyms.json with at least 50 biological laboratory entity normalization mappings for entity and node normalization.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN data/synonyms.json is loaded THEN it contains at least 50 alias-to-canonical mappings; WHEN common aliases such as PBS buffer, Falcon管, BSC, 移液枪 are queried THEN they normalize to canonical terms; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:21
review_initial_requirements: Check that mappings are domain-relevant, non-empty strings, and include Chinese and English/common lab aliases.
review_regression_requirements: Run knowledge-focused tests and full build/test after integration; ensure existing SOP output remains compatible.

title: Create domain patterns knowledge file
description: Create data/domain-patterns.json covering all 22 standard action categories with required parameters, optional parameters, typical risks, related requirements, and engineering hints.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN domain patterns load THEN all 22 actions from ACTION_DICTIONARY are present; WHEN each pattern is inspected THEN requiredParameters, optionalParameters, typicalRisks, relatedRequirements, and engineeringHints are valid; ref: src/pipeline/atomizer/action-dict.ts:7
review_initial_requirements: Check coverage against ACTION_DICTIONARY and ensure relatedRequirements only use R1-R10.
review_regression_requirements: Run knowledge tests and requirement tests to verify domain-pattern traversal.

title: Create parameter constraints knowledge file
description: Create data/parameter-constraints.json with engineering units, typical ranges, thresholds, tolerances, and notes for core biological process parameters.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN parameter constraints load THEN each entry has unit, typicalRange, tolerance, and notes; WHEN core parameters 温度, 离心力, 时间, 体积, CO2浓度 are queried THEN constraints are present; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:70
review_initial_requirements: Check numeric ranges are valid ascending pairs and tolerance strings are non-empty.
review_regression_requirements: Run knowledge tests and ensure parameter extraction tests still pass.

title: Create risk catalog knowledge file
description: Create data/risk-catalog.json with 15-20 standard risks including category, severity, trigger actions, handling, and verification method.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN risk catalog loads THEN it contains between 15 and 20 risks; WHEN each risk is inspected THEN category, severity, triggerActions, standardHandling, and verificationMethod are valid; ref: src/pipeline/atomizer/index.ts:225
review_initial_requirements: Check severities are low, medium, or high and trigger actions map to known actions.
review_regression_requirements: Run knowledge tests and atomizer risk tests after integration.

title: Implement knowledge base loader
description: Create src/knowledge/loader.ts with KnowledgeBase interfaces and loadKnowledgeBase() to load and validate all knowledge JSON files.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN loadKnowledgeBase() runs with default data directory THEN it returns synonyms, domainPatterns, parameterConstraints, and riskCatalog; WHEN a required file or required field is missing THEN it throws an error naming the invalid file; ref: docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-11-intelligence-enhancement.md:135
review_initial_requirements: Check type definitions, validation depth, error messages, and default path behavior.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/knowledge.test.ts plus npm run build.

title: Add knowledge base tests
description: Create tests/knowledge.test.ts covering loading, validation failures, and query helpers for knowledge base files.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN npm test runs THEN tests/knowledge.test.ts validates successful loading, invalid fixture rejection, synonym lookup, domain pattern lookup, parameter constraints, and risk lookup; ref: tests/requirements.test.ts:1
review_initial_requirements: Check tests exercise real JSON files and at least one invalid temporary data directory.

title: Integrate knowledge lookups into atomizer inference
description: Update atomizer field inference to use knowledge base lookups for inputs, targets, containers, tools, output states, conditions, and risks while preserving existing defaults.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN atomizeSop runs without explicit knowledge THEN default knowledge is used; WHEN actions trigger catalog risks THEN risks come from risk-catalog.json; WHEN existing sample SOP is processed THEN current OP shape remains compatible; ref: src/pipeline/atomizer/index.ts:61
review_initial_requirements: Check backward-compatible AtomizeOptions, no repeated disk loads in tight loops, and sensible fallback behavior.

title: Use synonyms during atomizer entity normalization
description: Update atomizer parameter and entity inference to normalize aliases through synonyms.json where applicable.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN atomizer sees aliases such as PBS buffer, Falcon管, BSC, or 移液枪 THEN inferred entities are canonicalized through knowledge synonyms; ref: src/pipeline/atomizer/index.ts:241
review_initial_requirements: Check synonym normalization is applied to extracted entities without corrupting numeric parameter rawText.

title: Use synonyms during hypergraph node normalization
description: Update hypergraph normalizedName generation to use synonyms.json for node deduplication instead of the hardcoded SYNONYMS map.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN buildHypergraph receives equivalent aliases THEN node normalizedName uses knowledge synonyms and duplicate aliases reuse the same node; ref: src/pipeline/hypergraph/index.ts:3
review_initial_requirements: Check default behavior, injected knowledge support, and removal or containment of hardcoded synonym map.

title: Replace hardcoded domain patterns in requirements
description: Update requirements generation to traverse domain-patterns.json for all actions instead of the centrifuge-only applyDomainPatterns rule.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN an action has requiredParameters in domain-patterns.json and the hyperedge lacks them THEN a clarification names the missing parameters; WHEN all required parameters are present THEN no missing-parameter clarification is produced; ref: src/pipeline/requirements/index.ts:255
review_initial_requirements: Check action lookup, source hyperedge linkage, clarification priority, and compatibility with existing centrifuge test.

title: Load knowledge base in pipeline runner
description: Update runPipeline to load KnowledgeBase once at pipeline start and pass it to atomizer, hypergraph, and requirements stages.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN runPipeline executes THEN knowledge base is loaded once and passed through all knowledge-aware stages; WHEN options.knowledgeBase is supplied THEN runner uses it instead of reading from disk; ref: src/pipeline/runner.ts:18
review_initial_requirements: Check dependency injection path for tests and no hidden repeated load per operation.

title: Update atomizer and requirements tests for knowledge injection
description: Update tests/requirements.test.ts and tests/atomizer.test.ts to cover knowledge-based inference and injection behavior.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN tests run THEN atomizer and requirements tests include knowledge-based synonym, risk, and domain-pattern cases while preserving existing sample behavior; ref: tests/atomizer.test.ts:25
review_initial_requirements: Check tests are not brittle to JSON ordering and validate behavior through public APIs.
review_regression_requirements: Run tests/atomizer.test.ts tests/requirements.test.ts and npm test.

title: Update E2E tests for knowledge-loaded pipeline
description: Update tests/e2e.test.ts to verify the full pipeline works with the knowledge base loaded.
acceptance_criteria: WHEN e2e tests run THEN full pipeline output is produced with knowledge-aware stages and run metadata remains valid; ref: tests/e2e.test.ts:11
review_initial_requirements: Check E2E verifies real pipeline path rather than importing internal modules only.
